0.q: MhGolS2 can improve plant saline-alkali tolerance by promoting polysaccharide synthesis, scavenging reactive oxygen species, and increasing the activity of antioxidant enzymes

2.q: the Y2H experiment confirmed the interaction between MhGolS2 and MhbZIP23, MhMYB1R1, MhbHLH60, and MhNAC1 proteins

7.q: ζ-Carotene desaturase (ZDS) is a key enzyme in carotenoid biosynthesis pathway, which can catalyze ζ-carotene to form lycopene to regulate carotenoid biosynthesis and accumulation.

8.q: GolS of the GT8 family is a key enzyme in the synthesis of the raffinose family of oligosaccharides (RFOs) and is the only known galactosyl donor in the RFOs metabolic pathway

9.q: Expression of antioxidant genes MhSOD, MhPOD, and MhCAT decreased significantly in WT and overexpressed calli under saline–alkali stress, and the decrease in MhSOD and MhCAT in overexpressed calli was significantly higher than that in WT calli.

10.q: Expression of antioxidant genes MhSOD, MhPOD, and MhCAT decreased significantly in WT and overexpressed calli under saline–alkali stress, and the decrease in MhSOD and MhCAT in overexpressed calli was significantly higher than that in WT calli.

11.q: Expression of Na+ transporters (MhCAX5, MhCAX5, MhSOS1, MhALT1) in WT and overexpressed calli also significantly decreased under saline–alkali stress, and was lower in overexpressed calli than in the WT.

14.q: Expression of H+-ATPase genes MhAHA2 and MhAHA8 significantly decreased under saline–alkali stress, while expression in overexpressed calli was lower than in the WT.

16.q: Expression of K+ transporter genes MhSKOR and MhNHX4 increased under saline–alkali stress compared with the WT.

17.q: Expression of K+ transporter genes MhSKOR and MhNHX4 increased under saline–alkali stress compared with the WT.

18.q: SOD, POD and CAT activities in MhANR-overexpression lines were also significantly lower than in the control, suggesting that the ectopic expression of ANR reduced the tolerance of A. thaliana to saline–alkali stress.
